title: Project Metadata, Python Packaging, Entry Points, Plugins, and Clean Installs
description: The generator runs only from its repository, imports templates through the current directory, has unbounded dependencies, discovers arbitrary plugins, omits package data, and is never installed into a clean environment. Learners cumulatively produce installed reproducible static-site command through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Declare build backend, project metadata, Python bounds, dependencies, optional groups, entry point, package data, license, and version source in pyproject.toml.
Expose an import-safe console script with argument parsing, status codes, stdout and stderr contracts, help, version, and module execution parity.
Load packaged templates, schemas, and default assets through supported resource APIs rather than current working directory assumptions.
